title: BEM-898 health dashboard
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/dashboard').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/tools').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

checks = [
 {'id':'baseline_ready','path':'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM889_REPOSITORY_READY.md'},
 {'id':'sending_ready','path':'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM894_SENDING_CONTOUR_READY.md'},
 {'id':'autonomous_loop','path':'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM895_AUTONOMOUS_LOOP_PASS.md'},
 {'id':'policy_gate','path':'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM896_POLICY_GATE_PASS.md'},
 {'id':'cycle_packaging','path':'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM897_REPORT_PACKAGING_PASS.md'},
 {'id':'dispatch_queue','path':'governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl'},
 {'id':'message_log','path':'governance/messages/managed_channel_messages.jsonl'},
 {'id':'worker_lifecycle','path':'governance/state/worker_contour_lifecycle.json'},
 {'id':'readiness_state','path':'governance/state/repository_readiness.json'},
 {'id':'sending_state','path':'governance/state/sending_contour_readiness.json'}
]
for c in checks:
    c['ok'] = Path(c['path']).exists()
status = 'HEALTHY' if all(c['ok'] for c in checks) else 'DEGRADED'
backlog_path = Path('governance/autonomy/NEXT_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json')
pending = []
completed = []
if backlog_path.exists():
    backlog = json.loads(backlog_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    pending = [i.get('id') for i in backlog.get('items', []) if i.get('status') == 'pending']
    completed = [i.get('id') for i in backlog.get('items', []) if i.get('status') == 'completed']
dashboard = {
  'status':status,
  'updated_at_utc3':'2026-05-30T07:02:00+03:00',
  'checks':checks,
  'autonomy_backlog_completed':completed,
  'autonomy_backlog_pending':pending,
  'next_recommended_task':pending[0] if pending else None,
  'summary':'baseline ready, sending contour ready, autonomous loop active' if status == 'HEALTHY' else 'one or more health checks failed'
}
Path('governance/dashboard/repository_health.json').write_text(json.dumps(dashboard, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
md = '# Repository health dashboard\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\n'
for c in checks:
    md += ('✅ ' if c['ok'] else '❌ ') + c['id'] + ' — ' + c['path'] + '\n'
md += '\nCompleted autonomy items: ' + (', '.join(completed) if completed else 'none') + '\n\nPending autonomy items: ' + (', '.join(pending) if pending else 'none') + '\n'
Path('governance/dashboard/REPOSITORY_HEALTH.md').write_text(md, encoding='utf-8')

tool = '''# BEM-898 repository health dashboard updater
import json
from pathlib import Path
dashboard = json.loads(Path("governance/dashboard/repository_health.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
print(dashboard["status"])
for check in dashboard["checks"]:
    print(("PASS" if check["ok"] else "FAIL") + " | " + check["id"])
raise SystemExit(0 if dashboard["status"] == "HEALTHY" else 1)
'''
Path('governance/tools/update_repository_health_dashboard.py').write_text(tool, encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/reports/BEM898_REPOSITORY_HEALTH_DASHBOARD.md').write_text('# BEM-898 Repository health dashboard\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nDashboard: governance/dashboard/repository_health.json\n\nPending: ' + (', '.join(pending) if pending else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM898_REPOSITORY_HEALTH_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-898 repository health proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nPending: ' + (', '.join(pending) if pending else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

if backlog_path.exists():
    backlog = json.loads(backlog_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    for item in backlog.get('items', []):
        if item.get('id') == 'BEM-898-001':
            item['status'] = 'completed'
            item['proof'] = str(marker)
        elif 'status' not in item:
            item['status'] = 'pending'
    backlog['status'] = 'completed' if all(i.get('status') == 'completed' for i in backlog.get('items', [])) else 'in_progress'
    backlog_path.write_text(json.dumps(backlog, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

changed_files.extend(['governance/dashboard/repository_health.json','governance/dashboard/REPOSITORY_HEALTH.md','governance/tools/update_repository_health_dashboard.py','governance/reports/BEM898_REPOSITORY_HEALTH_DASHBOARD.md',str(marker),'governance/autonomy/NEXT_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json'])
ops_applied.append('BEM898 repository health dashboard ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
